subcodes.first_line: The Book pronounceth with truth - and verily it is a perspicuous Book - a portion from the Book which none hath known save God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب یحکم بالحق و انه لکتاب مبین فصل من الکتاب الذی مااطلع به الا الله رب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @call to action
